# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Register track ScrollViewers on Loaded (and remove on Unloaded) instead of using ScrollChanged to avoid per-scroll overhead.
- Prefer incremental, behavior-preserving refactoring to enhance code readability and maintainability.

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules.
- Follow naming conventions.
- Utilize modern C# syntax and adhere to DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) principles in your code design.

## Project-Specific Rules
- Custom requirement A
- Custom requirement B
- Ensure all changes are test-backed to maintain code integrity.
